title: Create ambientListener.ts — passive ambient listening foundation
completion_summary: Created ambientListener.ts with AmbientListener class (start/stop/pause/resume lifecycle), feedTranscript pipeline, slang extraction via static+dynamic markers, pattern detection callbacks, flushMemory into learningStore via acceptAmbientEntry, privacy-first default OFF

context_files.reason: Ambient listening requirements: passive capture, memory extraction, configurability

acceptance_criteria: AmbientListener class with start()/stop()/pause()/resume() lifecycle methods
Collects ambient speech transcripts (NOT audio — transcript-only for privacy)
Extracts useful patterns via memory extraction pipeline
Accepts ambient-derived entries into learningStore via acceptAmbientEntry()
No audio recording or storage — transcripts only, ephemeral
Imports only from allowed files (types.ts, learningStore.ts, conversationLearner.ts, languageMarkers.ts)
